description: Cloud brain: Vercel Next.js app with 15-min cron that books safari_command_queue slots based on business metrics, processes results, and shows a live booking dashboard

features.name: Next.js 16 project scaffold at /Users/isaiahdupree/Documents/Software/agentlite with vercel.json crons (*/15 orchestrate, */5 process-results), dark terminal theme (#0d0d0d bg, #22c55e green, Geist Mono)
lib/supabase.ts: supabaseAdmin using SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY. Creates agent_bookings and agent_metrics tables idempotently on import (SQL migration inline).

lib/decision-engine.ts: decideNextAction(metrics) evaluates 5 rules in order (funnel low, DM queue empty, Upwork not scanned today, morning discovery, profile enrich stale) and returns Decision with action/platform/params/reason/priority

lib/booking.ts: bookAction(decision) finds next available slot (no bookings within 15min), enforces 9am-9pm America/Chicago active hours, inserts into safari_command_queue AND agent_bookings, returns { bookingId, scheduledFor }
GET /api/metrics returns { prospects_in_funnel, dms_pending, dms_sent_today, upwork_proposals_pending, reply_rate_7d, contacts_total, last_discovery_at } — all from real Supabase queries
GET /api/schedule?hours=24 returns { upcoming: [...agent_bookings rows...], counts: { scheduled, executing, completed_today, failed_today } }
POST /api/book accepts { action, platform, params, scheduled_for } and inserts into both safari_command_queue and agent_bookings, returns { bookingId, scheduledFor, queueId }

POST /api/cron/orchestrate (with Authorization: Bearer CRON_SECRET) snapshots metrics, checks queue, calls decideNextAction, calls bookAction, returns { status: 'booked'|'idle'|'skip', decision, booking }
POST /api/cron/process-results reads completed safari_command_queue rows not yet processed, records to agent_metrics, updates agent_bookings status to completed, marks rows as processed
app/page.tsx dashboard: 4 stat cards (prospects_in_funnel, dms_pending, reply_rate_7d, upwork_proposals_pending), upcoming bookings list, recent results list, 30s auto-refresh — dark terminal theme
npm run build passes with zero TypeScript errors
npx vercel --yes --prod deploys successfully and https://<agentlite-url>/api/health returns { status: 'ok' }
